3ClYwv: One route in the file uses the same hostname and target as an entry already in your list.
MG4uhk: One new route will be added.
MRhuSj: Overwrite matching entries with the values from the file?

ShaDOE: cloudflared is not detected. Install Cloudflare Tunnel and reopen the app, or set the binary path in Settings.
XNvF2M: This deletes the tunnel entries and app settings stored in CFM's database on this device. This cannot be undone. If any tunnels are running, close them or restart the app afterward.
ayyhxE: Remove all saved entries and settings from this device and recreate an empty database. Restart the app if tunnels were running.
